aboutBody: {{brand}} delivers professional landing pages for local businesses — a clean digital restart, not patching an old CMS.

pathA.title: Landing Page · digital restart
pathA.subtitle: A modern, fast page for your business: mobile-first, clear path to booking or a call. Not WordPress patchwork — a clean restart in 5–7 business days.
pathA.what1: Finished landing page — mobile, clear path to call or inquiry
pathA.what2: Full website archive (ZIP) — you own the files
pathA.what4: By package: upload help or full publication (you pay domain/hosting)
pathA.what5: Optional: analysis of your current site for the restart
pathA.whatLogo: Your existing logo and brand colors are integrated into the site
pathA.whatDomain: We help you choose a suitable hosting provider. Popular options in Germany include Hetzner, IONOS, All-Inkl and Netcup. Domain and hosting contracts are between you and the provider
pathA.whatLegal: Impressum and privacy templates from your details — go-live only after your review
pathA.process3: We deliver the landing in 5–7 business days
pathA.faq1q: Do you fix our old website?
pathA.faq1a: No. We deliver a new modern landing restart — no dependency on your old CMS.
pathA.faq2a: Basic €350 · Business €650 · Premium €1,200 — one-time. Domain and hosting stay your ongoing costs.
pathA.faq3a: Order, payment, ZIP and publish questions: email {{email}} — we reply in German for DE. The chat on this page is for trying the assistant, not order helpdesk.
pathA.faq4q: Is hosting included in the price?
pathA.faq4a: No. We help you choose; common options in Germany include Hetzner, IONOS, All-Inkl and Netcup. Contract and payment are directly with the provider. Business/Premium: we set up the site with your access.
pathA.faq5q: Is Vector support for my order?
pathA.faq5a: No. Vector on /site is for getting to know the product. Anything about active orders (status, download, revisions, hosting access) — please {{email}}.
pathA.afterPay: After payment, production starts. Track status and download your files on the order page.

order.title: Landing Page · digital restart
order.subtitle: A new fast landing page in about 5–7 business days (HTML, mobile, clear booking path). Not WordPress patchwork — an honest restart.
order.subtitleLaunch: Your site is prepared with Vector — finish launch and publish
order.bulletAfterPay: After payment — we produce your landing and deliver the files
order.bulletSorglos: Optional: upload to your domain (hands-off) — domain/hosting paid by customer
order.descriptionPh: Briefly: services, who for, what makes you different
order.companyWebsiteHint: If you already have a website, share it. We analyze it automatically and use the results when building your new landing page.
order.domainHostingNote: We help you choose a suitable hosting provider. Popular options in Germany include Hetzner, IONOS, All-Inkl and Netcup. The domain and hosting contract is between you and the provider you choose. Business/Premium: you share access — we upload the site and/or connect domain and SSL.
order.logoNote: Your existing logo and colors are integrated (send the file by email after ordering). New logo design is not included unless agreed separately.
order.legalHint: Optional at order time — required to publish in Germany. We fill templates; you review before go-live. Not legal advice.
order.launchFixed: Fixed launch price for the agreed version — no plan shopping or rebuild.
order.payAfter: Payment after confirmation. No hidden fees.
order.agreeSubmit: By clicking “Get a proposal” you agree to the
order.agreeLaunch: By clicking “Launch project” you agree to the
order.emailRequired: Please enter your email — confirmation and payment link go there
order.serverDown: Server unavailable. Please try again later.
order.payUnavailable: Payment temporarily unavailable — we will contact you with an invoice.

status.title: Order status
status.bookmark: Bookmark this page — order status stays up to date here.

kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.description: Questions about orders, status or partnership — email us. Support replies in German for the DE market.

servicesIntro: {{brand}}: Landing Page restart (350 / 650 / 1200 €) for local businesses.
